initial_analysis.rough_description: A close-up view of a car tire slowly rolling over a pile of small, colorful water beads on a concrete surface, crushing them.

initial_analysis.rough_description: A car tire is positioned on a concrete driveway, aligned to crush a row of small pineapple-patterned paper cups filled with colorful water beads.

sound_sources.label: Car Tire
sound_sources.notes: The tire of the car rolling and crushing objects.

sound_sources.label: Water Beads
sound_sources.notes: Water beads being squished and crushed under the tire.

sound_sources.label: Pineapple Paper Cups
sound_sources.notes: Paper cups filled with water beads being crushed.

sound_events.description: Wet popping, squishing, and crunching sounds of thousands of water beads being crushed under the heavy tire.
Continuous low outdoor background ambience with slight wind.
Car tire rolling slowly as it crushes the paper cups.
Low rubbery crunch and rolling sound of the car tire moving over the pavement and beads.
Low rumble and hum of the car engine running continuously.
Slight wet squishing and popping from the water beads spilling and popping out of the crushed cups.
Crunching and collapsing sounds of paper cups being flattened one by one by the tire.
